## Description

Provide a brief description of the changes in this PR.

- [ ] I described what changed and why
- [ ] Changes address a specific issue or feature request

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (fixes an issue without changing existing functionality)
- [ ] New feature (adds new functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (a fix or feature that modifies existing functionality)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Plugin maturity update
- [ ] Dependency update

Describe how to verify the changes:

1. Step one
2. Step two
3. Step three

## Checklist

### Code Quality

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have run `npm run format` and `npm run lint` locally
- [ ] I have run `npm run typecheck` and verified no new errors
- [ ] Code changes are focused and minimal

### Testing

- [ ] I ran the relevant automated tests and checks
- [ ] I added tests for new functionality (if applicable)
- [ ] All tests pass locally

### Documentation

- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation
- [ ] Documentation follows [docs/MARKDOWN_STYLE.md](../../docs/MARKDOWN_STYLE.md)
- [ ] Cross-references and links are accurate

### Plugin Governance

- [ ] If this PR changes any plugin maturity tier, I confirmed Gold promotion is reviewer-driven only and updated `maturity.tier: gold`, `maturity.lastReviewedAt`, and `maturity.notes` together (no score-only auto-promotion)
